name: foldback
description: **FoldBack** is a high-performance, authoritative game server engine written in **Common Lisp**. It is "fundamentally different" because it treats the entire game world as a single, immutable value using **Persistent Data Structures (FSet)**.

scripts.test:fp-cross: sbcl --non-interactive --load foldback.asd --eval '(asdf:load-system :foldback :force t)' --load tests/fixed-point-cross-test.lisp --eval '(foldback::run-fixed-point-cross-tests)' --eval '(quit)' && node tests/fixed-point-cross-test.js
